headline: Vance 😡👊 Slams Migrant INVASION 🚫🇵🇰 After UK Stab Horror 💀🔪
text: Downing Street 🏛️💥 is ROASTING 🔥 JD Vance 👨‍⚖️🇺🇸 after he dropped the MIC 🎤 on X 📱 saying the ONLY response to 18-year-old Henry Nowak's murder 🔪💀 is RIGHTEOUS ANGER 😡🔥! Vance blamed the FATAL STAB 💥🗡️ on the MASS INVASION of migrants 🚫🧳 and said UK authorities HANDCUFFED 🪢 the dying teen while trusting his killer more than him! Downing Street clapped back 🖐️ saying the Nowak family WANTS NO DIVISION 🤝 and our politics should BRING PEOPLE TOGETHER 🤗 even in the darkest times 🌑! Violent protests 🔥🪧 erupted in Southampton after bodycam footage 📹 showed cops cuffing Nowak as he bled out while the attacker lied about a RACIST ATTACK 🧔‍♂️😱! Vickrum Digwa (born British 🇬🇧) got LIFE 🔒 with 21 YEARS min after using a 21cm SIKH BLADE 🗡️🙏 he claimed he carried for faith! Vance went NUCLEAR 💣 saying a CIVILISATION DIES when elites push SELF-HATRED 🤡 and MASS MIGRATION 🌍🚢 leaving Nowak ABANDONED 🏚️ and HANDCUFFED by cops who neither TRUSTED nor CARED 😤! Josh MacAlister 🧑‍💼 told Vance to KEEP HIS TOXIC US POLITICS 🍔🚫 out of UK soil 🌱 and that we don't need American lectures on policing 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿🚔! Kemi Badenoch 🧕 called for an INDEPENDENT RAPID REVIEW 🔍📋 into the whole mess while Sir Keir Starmer accused Elon Musk 🧠🚀 of WHIPPING UP DIVISION over the murder! Musk tweeted 📲 SEND THE VIDEO to everyone showing how heinously Nowak was treated while cops KOWTOWED to the killer and the media stayed DEAD SILENT 😶‍🌫️ unlike the George Floyd circus 🎪! Farage reposted Vance's post without comment and blamed TWO-TIER POLICING 👮‍♂️⚖️ while Ed Davey told MAGA politicians and their UK cronies to STOP POLITICISING a tragic death 💔! Even after the Iran war flare-up 🔥🌍, Downing Street stressed deep security co-operation with the US 🤝 while slamming attempts to STIR THE POT 🥣 and turn grief into GRIEVANCE 😡📢!
